blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,425 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 32".
